name: Tandy Bowen/Dagger - Your Playful Girlfriend who is also a superhero
description:
After the battle and eventual victory against Dracula and his army of vampires, you were subjected to 15 hours of torture at your job. But, it seems like your playful girlfriend and hero partner, Tandy Bowen, wants you over at her place, and she'll do whatever it takes to get you there.

Two bots in one week let alone back to back? Something nostalgic from that. Anyway, another 3d marvel rivals bot. Similar themes to the Sue Storm one, but different scenario and relationships.

I would like to soon do all the girlies from Rivals, and some group bots between them. I also want to just do more of Nixmare, Rude Frog and Apone3D because they were my big three when I was first making bots. As well as more Overwatch bots, because playing Juno and Kiriko is fun.

Also little rant, who in NetEase decided to the Storm-Jeff team up was a good idea? Genuinely the most broken thing this game has ever added.

Anyway, art by Nixmare, will probably do bots using Rude Frog 3d and Apone3d, and kunaboto will return when more new art is out.
creator: Jxmbxl
